Home/Rebates & Financing

Upgrade support

HVAC rebates and financing made visible inside the quote.

Help homeowners compare equipment, comfort, efficiency, utility rebates and monthly-payment options without turning the buying process into homework.

Heat pump rebates

Show available rebate paths for eligible heat pump replacements and conversions.

Ductless rebates

Position mini-split projects around comfort, efficiency and utility incentives when available.

Financing options

Promote 0% short-term options and longer payment plans for full system replacements.

Sales structure

Use Good / Better / Best quotes.

This keeps the proposal premium but easy to understand: one practical option, one better comfort/efficiency option and one high-performance option with the clearest long-term story.

  • Equipment and scope included
  • Rebate eligibility notes
  • Financing path shown clearly
  • Permit, haul-away and commissioning included
